text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
MBSF Cost and Use Segment Codebook │ March 2026 │ V 1.3 32 

HH_VISITS 

LABEL: Home Health Visits 

DESCRIPTION: This variable is the count of home health (HH) visits for the year. The CCW variable 
CLM_HHA_TOT_VISIT_CNT is used to obtain this variable. 

This algorithm includes all claims with a CLM_PMT_AMT ≥ $0.; therefore it differs from the algorithms 
used for the other PTA utilization algorithms. 

SHORT NAME: — 

LONG NAME:
